name: Geometry-Guided Constraint Learning for LLM Safety Classification
summary: arXiv:2607.19366v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Safety as Polytope (SaP) learns linear half-space constraints in LLM hidden space but requires per-category tuning of the constraint count K. We show...
description: arXiv:2607.19366v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Safety as Polytope (SaP) learns linear half-space constraints in LLM hidden space but requires per-category tuning of the constraint count K. We show that sparse autoencoder (SAE) feature extraction resolves this: K=2 becomes optimal for 12/14 categories on Qwen3.5-9B, achieving 96-99% accuracy per category on our BeaverTails classification benchm...
author: Fumiaki Uehara, Koo Imai, Masato Tsutsumi, Keigo Kansa, Sora Usui, Yuki Kobiyama
